title: Nucor (NUE) Sees Lower Q3 Earnings on Weaker Steel Mills Profit
text: Nucor (NUE) expects earnings to decline significantly in the steel mills unit on a sequential comparison basis in Q3 due to metal margin contraction and lower shipment volumes.

title: Nucor (NYSE:NUE) – Why Nucor Stock Is Sliding Today
text: Nucor Corp (NYSE: NUE) shares are trading lower Wednesday after the company issued weak third-quarter earnings guidance.

title: Nucor stock dives after warning of surprise profit decline, amid steel mills weakness
text: Shares of Nucor Corp. NUE, -3.97% sank 4.5% toward a seven-week low in premarket trading Wednesday, after the steel maker issued a third-quarter profit warning, as weakness in its steel mills business is offsetting strength in steel products. The company expects earnings per share of $6.30 to $6.40, down from $7.28 in the year-ago period, and below the FactSet EPS consensus of $7.56.
